events.title: Trivia Night
events.description: Nevada City’s longest running Trivia Night happens on *most* Wednesdays at the Crazy Horse. Great minds unite to Eat! Drink! Think! Bring your most clever friends, establish a team of up to five people and catalyze the collective power of your brilliant intellect. Your charismatic host BK will present questions covering a wide range of subjects in eight different categories. You’ll tap into knowledge you didn’t even realize you had. It’s challenging, it’s fun and it’s a refreshing change from th
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Band Beyond Description Presents...The Church of JGB
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS **BBD has been moved up to an 8:30pm start for the time being!** If the Grateful Dead is your religion, then the Crazy Horse is your church when Third Thursday rolls around. Every month Jonny Mojo (Achilles Wheel), Gary Campus (Deadbeats) and Tim High (Tim High & the Mighty) host a cast of the finest musicians from around the region to conjure lightning in a bottle. BBD is a gathering point for everyone who wants to take a leap into the realm of possibility where that Grateful D
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Magoo **SOLD OUT**
events.description: On a Sunday at the end of July, a progressive bluegrass quartet from Denver, Colorado called Magoo was slated to play the Crazy Horse Saloon. In the lead up to the event, nary a single person in the area had heard of this band. How then can you explain that the show sold out and was instantly regarded as not only one of the highlights of the year, but one of the best shows many people had ever seen at this legendary venue? Phenomena such as this are becoming more commonplace along the meteoric p
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Toubab Krewe
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS NOW! Coming all the way from Asheville, NC, Toubab Krewe return to the Crazy Horse for what has become an annual tradition. This instrumental powerhouse creates a sonic Pangaea that lustily swirls African traditions with groove-based rock, trance-inducing jam sensibilities, international folk strains and more. While nearly impossible to put in any box, it takes only a few moments to realize in a very palpable way that one is face-to-face with a true original. Beyond their ground
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Smoked Out Soul
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS “Old school taste, new school bass.” Smoked Out Soul is a future-forward funk collective, blending classic soul with modern bass music. The high-energy live show combines a DJ dance set with live horns, synths, guitar, drums and percussion – bridging the gap between Memphis grit and California cool; dusty vinyl and digital heat. What began as a weekly party at Monarch, a legendary club in San Francisco’s Mission District, has evolved into a full-fledged touring band, production
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: SambaDa
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Based in the rich musical traditions of Brazil, SambaDá also references salsa and cumbia, blending them playfully with funk and reggae beats. Brazilian natives Papiba Godinho and Dandha da Hora bring profound knowledge and respect for Brazilian music, and together with the entire band, they present a unique musical sound with a universal appeal. events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States
